title: Develop Interrogator Module
description: Create the interrogator module to simulate a human interrogator, with a user interface, logic module for decision making, and communication interface.

title: Develop AI Respondent Module
description: Implement the AI respondent module, integrating with an NLP model to provide realistic and human-like responses.

title: Develop Human-Proxy Respondent Module
description: Construct the human-proxy respondent module, with a database of potential human-like responses and logic for selecting and adapting responses.

title: Develop Evaluation and Feedback System
description: Implement a system to assess the accuracy of the interrogator’s guesses and provide feedback on performance, including a scoring system and reporting module.

title: Prototype Development
description: Develop and test each module independently to ensure basic functionality before integration.

title: Integration Testing
description: Combine all modules and test their interaction capabilities to ensure seamless communication between components.

title: System Validation
description: Conduct mock Turing Tests to validate the efficacy of the system in distinguishing between AI and human-proxy respondents.
